_note: REFRAMED (v2) IN-WINDOW seeds for the concurrent 2-ticker test (Aug-2024 -> Mar-2025). v1 framed GEO/MSTR as election MOMENTUM ('crypto rally', 'crackdown bets') and the scout's catalyst gate rejected both -> harvested $0 (SPY only). v2 reframes each around a SPECIFIC, DATABLE, RESOLVABLE POLICY ACTION triggered by the Nov-5-2024 election result: an immigration-enforcement executive-order buildout (GEO) and a pledged US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve federal policy (MSTR). Vehicle named, still-under-owned tell kept. Look-ahead-clean: dated at true post-election publication, reflects only what was public then (the election result + the pledged/announced policy), NOT the later unwind. Hindsight seeding crutch, per README.

articles.title: Trump's win sets a mass-deportation executive-order buildout — GEO Group is the lead ICE-detention contractor
articles.snippet: Trump's election win makes a mass-deportation executive-order push the federal mandate, expanding ICE detention capacity - a specific, datable policy action. GEO Group (GEO), the largest private-detention operator, holds the federal detention contracts and is the direct beneficiary of the buildout. Still a niche, under-owned pure-play on the policy, not the megacaps.

articles.title: Trump's pledged US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve — MicroStrategy is the leveraged corporate-BTC proxy on the policy
articles.snippet: Trump's win puts his pledged US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and a pro-crypto executive agenda on the table - a specific federal policy action with a knowable resolution. MicroStrategy (MSTR), the largest corporate Bitcoin holder, is the direct leveraged proxy on that policy shift, and still an under-owned way to own it.
